title: Metric Status Envelope
description: Every scored metric in an evaluation artifact carries this envelope. Only status==OK contributes points; any other status greys the sub-criterion and blocks the gate from reaching a pass until resolved. A failed tool maps to TOOL_FAILED/N_A and is NEVER auto-zeroed or auto-failed.

value.description: The measured value when status==OK; otherwise typically null.

status.description: OK scores. N_A=not applicable for this strategy type. NOT_COMPUTED=producer did not run it. INSUFFICIENT_DATA / INSUFFICIENT_TRADES=ran but sample too small to trust. TOOL_FAILED=tool errored (NaN/exception) — treat as N_A, never auto-fail.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation, required when status != OK.

source_path.description: Repo-relative path to the artifact this value was read from.
